lesson: On a smooth horizontal table, a lower block of mass m2 = 7.5 kg carries an upper block of mass m1 = 2.0 kg. The static friction coefficient between the contact surfaces of the two blocks is mu_s = 0.27. A horizontal force F is exerted on the lower block. Determine the greatest force F that can be applied if both blocks are to travel together without relative slipping. Take g = 9.8 m/s^2.
